title: oenothera parviflora subsp. germanica
intro: Oenothera parviflora subsp. germanica, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its delicate white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera parviflora subsp. germanica include relief from symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome (PMS), menopausal hot flashes, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into supplements, oils, or teas, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support skin health.
